entity.label: Apphia
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: Increasing, a female Christian at Colosse (Philemon 1:2), supposed by some to have been the wife of Philemon.

nodes.label: Apphia
nodes.description: Increasing, a female Christian at Colosse (Philemon 1:2), supposed by some to have been the wife of Philemon.

verses.text: And to our beloved Apphia, and Archippus our fellowsoldier, and to the church in thy house:
